positive: A central, highly stylized illustration of a majestic cosmic owl perched on a geometric crescent moon. The owl should have striking, feather details that resemble celestial nebula swirls (deep purples, vibrant blues, and glowing turquoises). The background is a minimalist, deep space landscape with abstract, glowing stellar clusters and subtle, clean constellations forming interconnected patterns. Use a strong linework style mixed with watercolor nebula washes for a mystical, vaporwave sci-fi aesthetic. Composition must be symmetrical and centered, designed for optimal textile printing on dark fabric. Highly contrasted, ethereal glow, clean silhouette.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, bad anatomy, deformed, low quality, amateur, low detail, extra limbs, messy, grainy
